title: Almost There
subtitle: Final growth and preparation
description: By week 34, your baby continues to grow and mature. The lungs are nearing full development, and your baby may settle deeper into the pelvis in preparation for birth.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements remain strong but space is limited
You may feel increased pelvic pressure as the baby settles lower
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine
Rest adequately and avoid strenuous activities

medical_checkups.note: Close monitoring continues as delivery approaches.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks maternal health and fetal position

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may closely monitor your baby’s position and readiness for birth.

important_note: Your baby is nearing full development and preparing for delivery.
reassurance: You are getting very close to meeting your baby.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider if you notice reduced movements or unusual discomfort.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports final growth and preparation for birth.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored closely during this stage.
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent management supports a healthy final phase.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports oxygen supply during this final growth stage.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure is essential as you approach delivery.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring may become more frequent.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing metabolic stability.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As you approach delivery, managing multiple conditions requires consistent and mindful care.
priority_tips: Maintain a balanced and regular lifestyle
Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care supports a smooth transition to delivery.
